current.headline: Netherlands vs Morocco knockout preview: team news and elimination stakes
current.summary: Morocco and the Netherlands enter a knockout meeting where the entire market question hinges on advancement. Pre-match coverage is centered on elimination stakes, expected lineups and how the tie may swing over regular time, extra time or penalties.

items.headline: Morocco and Netherlands prepare for high-stakes World Cup knockout
items.summary: Build-up to the Morocco-Netherlands tie has focused on knockout pressure, conservative tactical setups and the binary advancement outcome that directly decides whether the Dutch are eliminated.
